label: Fixture Detail
description: Match stats, timeline, odds movement chart, and trade panel for the selected fixture.

0.6.note: No async loading path (synchronous selection from context).

0.7.note: No-selection empty state: dashed border placeholder with guidance text.

0.8.note: No error path needed (detail rendered from context-provided fixture).

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().selectedFixture — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Pure detail panel — org filter operates upstream in fixtures list.

1.6.note: No scope → shows fixture when any is selected.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file.

l1.notes: Pure detail panel — data flows from master widget (sports-fixtures) via context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (live stats/score), paper ✓ (view-only, trade panel disabled), batch ✓ (historical fixture stats, no trade submission).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() → mode propagated to SportsDataContext.

3.5.note: Paper mode: detail panel shows stats/timeline; trade panel within FixtureDetailPanel sub-component expected to be disabled.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in widget file — WS handled by context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: Only onClick is onClose → setSelectedFixtureId(null). No dead buttons.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify tabs (stats/odds-history/replay) toggle, trade panel submits correctly.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting (trade panel for selected fixture). This is the bet placement entry point for a specific match.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough 5.2-5.6 pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. All tokens: bg-muted/10, border-border, text-muted-foreground, bg-card/30.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useMemo/useEffect in this file — no performance anti-patterns.

8.1.note: No text-[] or fontSize arbitrary values.

8.3.note: No custom div primitives — delegates to FixtureDetailPanel sub-component.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role. Human: keyboard walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=5 pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Classic master/detail pattern — detail panel separable for flexible layout presets.

relationships.notes: Consumes selectedFixture from SportsDataContext, set by sports-fixtures widget.

dataContract.notes: Detail data flows from SportsDataContext.selectedFixture — same WebSocket feed as fixtures list.

gaps: Trade panel implementation within FixtureDetailPanel not fully audited in this pass
coverage.notes: Detail panel shows stats/timeline/odds via FixtureDetailPanel sub-component.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
